directive: Task-specific browser helper or domain-skill changes must be written only under agent-workspace/; do not modify src/browser_harness/ for task-specific additions.
rationale: The repo separates the protected core package from the agent-editable workspace. Task-specific helper additions belong in agent-workspace/ so the core harness stays small and stable.

source_evidence.text: The repo says an agent operating the harness only edits inside agent-workspace/, specifically agent_helpers.py and domain-skills/.
The day-to-day usage skill directs task-specific edits to agent-workspace/agent_helpers.py and treats domain skills as agent-workspace content.
The design constraints keep core helpers short and place task-specific helper additions in agent-workspace/agent_helpers.py.
The README labels src/browser_harness/ as the protected core package and lists agent-workspace paths as the edited helper and skill locations.
